column1: Chinese Title: 崭新的世界 (Zhǎnxīn de Shìjiè)
I can show you the world
column2: 我愿和你分享 (Wǒ yuàn hé nǐ fēnxiǎng)
这世界多么宽广 (Zhè shìjiè duōme kuānguǎng)

column1: Tell me princess now when did
column2: 只要你随我前往 (Zhǐyào nǐ suí wǒ qiánwǎng)

column1: You last let your heart decide
column2: 那是你梦想的地方 (Nà shì nǐ mèngxiǎng de dìfāng)
缘分从天而降 (Yuánfèn cóngtiān érjiàng)
这美妙不可言讲 (Zhè měimiào bùkěyánjiǎng)
抛开烦恼和忧伤 (Pāokāi fánnǎo hé yōushāng)
我们可以去流浪 (Wǒmen kěyǐ qù liúlàng)

column1: A new fantastic point of view
column2: 陌生的光亮在眼前 (Mòshēng de guāngliàng zài yǎnqián)

column1: No one to tell us no
column2: 这里没人说不 (Zhèlǐ méirén shuō bù)
给我希望和方向 (Gěi wǒ xīwàng hé fāngxiàng)

column1: A dazzling place I never knew
column2: 多么灿烂 多么无限 (Duōme cànlàn duōme wúxiàn)

column1: But when I'm way up here
column2: 当我飞翔天际 (Dāng wǒ fēixiáng tiānjì)

column1: That now I'm in a whole new world with you
column2: 我的世界因为你而改变 (Wǒ de shìjiè yīnwèi nǐ ér gǎibiàn)
